problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
hypothesis: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Monoclonal. Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
